name: regression-tests
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the regression-tests multi-agent test workflow plugin.

plugins.name: regression-tests
plugins.description: Multi-agent test workflows: regression-tests (lock current behavior of code) and tdd (drive new feature development with failing-tests-first plus an implementation-author). Both skills share eleven specialist agents (coverage planning, parallel test authoring, adversarial specialist team + synthesis, mutation testing, fuzzing) and a Rust CLI `regression-tests` exposing the deterministic helpers. Supports Rust and C#.
